## Summary

<!-- auto-generated by Claude -->

## Background

Issue jleechan-5pqo: The `--storage=firestore` CLI flag for the blog server and novel CLI was planned but never documented as implemented in `CLAUDE.md`. The actual implementation (`FirestoreBlogStorage`, `storage-factory.ts`, `storage-firestore.ts`, and wired `--storage` flag in `server.ts` and `cli.ts`) was already merged to `main` in prior PRs тАФ only the documentation lagged behind.

## Goals

- Update `CLAUDE.md` "Key Design Decisions" to reflect that `--storage=firestore` is fully implemented
- Add `STORAGE_TYPE`, `FIRESTORE_PROJECT_ID`, and `FIRESTORE_COLLECTION` to the Environment Variables table

## Tenets

- Minimal scope: only `CLAUDE.md` documentation needed updating; all code was already on `main`
- No code changes, no test changes

## Changes

- **`CLAUDE.md`**: Updated "Storage factory" line from "planned тАФ not yet implemented" to reflect the implemented state; added three new env vars to the table

## Testing

- `npm test` тАФ 37 tests pass, 1 skipped (Firestore emulator test тАФ skipped when `FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST` is not set); pre-existing `install.test.ts` failure is unrelated (requires built `dist/` tree)

## Verification

- Ran: `npm test -- tests/storage-factory.test.ts tests/blog.test.ts tests/novel.test.ts` тАФ 3/3 test files pass (38 tests)
- `git diff origin/main` тАФ only `CLAUDE.md` changed

> [!NOTE]
> **Low Risk**
> Documentation-only update clarifying that Firestore storage selection/config is already implemented; no runtime behavior changes.
> 
> **Overview**
> Updates `CLAUDE.md` to reflect that the Firestore storage backend is **already wired** and selectable via `--storage=firestore`/`--storage firestore` or `STORAGE_TYPE`, including guidance on `FIRESTORE_PROJECT_ID` inference and emulator usage.
> 
> Expands the environment variable table with Firestore-related settings (`STORAGE_TYPE`, `FIRESTORE_PROJECT_ID`, `FIRESTORE_COLLECTION`, `FIRESTORE_EM
